hypothesis: Outlier-resistant cross-sectional ranking using median trade contribution, not total PnL.
market_mechanism: Robust estimators reduce dependence on one explosive small-cap winner.
primary_failure_mode: May only make bad strategies fail faster.
minimum_probe: Run on historical artifacts as diagnostics, no new market data.

hypothesis: Dollar-bar version of opening reclaim reduces time-bar noise before strategy logic.
market_mechanism: Variance stabilization by sampling on traded notional instead of clock time.
required_data: Databento trades or 1m bars with dollar volume; no L3 required
primary_failure_mode: Dollar bars improve estimation but do not create alpha by themselves.
minimum_probe: Build transformer on stored bars and compare distribution diagnostics only.
blocked_until: No strategy signal until data transform validator exists

hypothesis: Cooldown and BAD_WIN exclusion improve live survivability but do not create alpha.
market_mechanism: Execution psychology can be enforced as code.
primary_failure_mode: Governance reduces errors but cannot rescue negative expectancy.
minimum_probe: Integrate governance tags into future post-run validator.

hypothesis: Provider sensitivity arbitrage is not alpha but can identify data-fragile hypotheses early.
market_mechanism: Signals that flip across providers are likely data artifacts.
primary_failure_mode: Becomes a meta-test, not a return source.
minimum_probe: Add provider fragility score to candidate ranking.

hypothesis: Same-day bad-news fade avoidance: no long reversion if SEC event is fundamental break.
market_mechanism: Some gap-downs are breakaway repricings, not overreaction.
primary_failure_mode: Event taxonomy too coarse to distinguish fraud, dilution, and earnings.
minimum_probe: Classifier-free rule audit on SEC item codes only.

hypothesis: Amihud illiquidity filter separates tradable small-cap drifts from cost traps.
market_mechanism: Illiquidity premium exists but can be untradeable unless capacity is modeled.
required_data: Daily OHLCV with dollar volume + corporate action caveats
primary_failure_mode: Illiquid winners vanish after impact and spread.
minimum_probe: Compute Amihud distributions only; no entry signal.
blocked_until: Provider coverage contract for daily data

hypothesis: Macro-regime switch disables high-beta small-cap signals during stress.
market_mechanism: Small-cap anomalies can invert when liquidity regime breaks.
primary_failure_mode: Regime filter overfits and removes all sample size.
minimum_probe: Spec-only ablation on existing failed trials.
blocked_until: No threshold chosen from OOS PnL

hypothesis: Biotech pre-catalyst drift exits before binary readout to avoid coin-flip exposure.
market_mechanism: Speculative positioning into known FDA/PDUFA or clinical readout windows.
required_data: Biotech catalyst calendar + prices + options/liquidity optional
primary_failure_mode: Calendar incomplete or single-asset blowups dominate.
minimum_probe: Provider/source audit for PDUFA/readout calendar only.

hypothesis: Post-earnings SUE drift on small-cap earnings with official point-in-time consensus.
market_mechanism: Slow information diffusion after earnings surprise.
required_data: SEC EDGAR Item 2.02 timestamps + PIT consensus/actual EPS + RTH bars
primary_failure_mode: No entitlement to SUE provider or costs consume drift.
minimum_probe: One-call SUE schema probe on CRMD, no backtest.

hypothesis: Quality-filtered small-cap momentum avoids junk-driven size anomaly decay.
market_mechanism: Size premium reappears after excluding low-quality firms.
required_data: Fundamental quality fields + PIT market cap + prices
primary_failure_mode: Quality fields are stale, non-PIT, or survivorship-biased.
minimum_probe: Provider schema entitlement probe for PIT fundamentals.

hypothesis: Opening reclaim after RTH-native gap-down only if spread-adjusted edge survives 500 bps.
market_mechanism: Intraday overreaction and liquidity absorption after regular-session dislocation.
required_data: Existing Databento RTH bars + spread proxy + cost model
primary_failure_mode: Gross edge exists but is too thin after taker costs.
minimum_probe: Spec-only cost sensitivity using already stored mini-panel outputs.

hypothesis: Order-flow absorption trigger for gap-downs using L3/L2 replaces VWAP reclaim.
market_mechanism: Passive institutional absorption can reveal exhaustion of forced selling.
required_data: Databento MBO/MBP or equivalent order-book feed
primary_failure_mode: Data volume and compute cost exceed current lab scope.
minimum_probe: Spec-only order-book data contract, no download.
